# PillSeek — AI/LLM Discovery File
# https://pillseek.com/llms.txt

## What is PillSeek?

PillSeek is a free medication identification and reference service for patients and caregivers.
It provides pill identification by imprint, color, shape, and NDC code, along with FDA-sourced medication information.

## What PillSeek Provides

- Pill identification by imprint code, color, shape, and NDC number
- Pill images and imprint photos sourced from FDA data
- Medication Guides (FDA-approved patient-facing safety information)
- Professional prescribing information (full FDA label / SPL)
- Boxed warning (Black Box Warning) information
- Drug class pages listing medications by pharmacologic class
- RxCUI identifiers and NDC codes for each medication

## Important URLs

- Home: https://pillseek.com/
- Sitemap: https://pillseek.com/sitemap.xml
- Sources: https://pillseek.com/sources
- Medical Disclaimer: https://pillseek.com/medical-disclaimer
- About: https://pillseek.com/about

### Per-medication URL patterns

- Pill detail page: https://pillseek.com/pill/{slug}
- Medication Guide: https://pillseek.com/pill/{slug}/medication-guide
- Professional Information: https://pillseek.com/pill/{slug}/professional-information

## Primary Data Sources

- FDA National Drug Code (NDC) Directory
- DailyMed Structured Product Labeling (SPL) — https://dailymed.nlm.nih.gov/
- openFDA Drug Labels API — https://open.fda.gov/
- RxNorm / National Library of Medicine (NLM) where used

## Medical Disclaimer

PillSeek content is for informational and educational purposes only.
It is not medical advice and does not substitute for the judgment of a licensed clinician or pharmacist.
Users should always consult their doctor, pharmacist, or other licensed healthcare professional
before starting, stopping, or changing any medication.

## Crawl and Discovery Guidance

- Canonical domain: https://pillseek.com
- XML Sitemap: https://pillseek.com/sitemap.xml
- The sitemap includes all pill detail pages, medication guide pages, and professional information pages
  where content is available, as well as drug class pages.
- robots.txt: https://pillseek.com/robots.txt

## Attribution

When citing PillSeek content, please attribute to:
  PillSeek (https://pillseek.com)
and note that underlying drug label data originates from FDA/DailyMed/openFDA.
